front: How is disulfide bond analysis performed on peptides?
back: Disulfide bonds are analyzed by: 1) Alkylation (iodoacetamide) of free cysteines before/after reduction, 2) Trypsin digestion under non-reducing conditions, 3) LC-MS/MS of disulfide-linked peptides, 4) Reduction with DTT/TCEP and comparison of mass shifts, 5) NMR for 3D structure.
